title: senecio muninensis
intro: Senecio muninensis, also known as Munro's ragwort, is a flowering plant species native to New Zealand. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, due to its expectorant properties. Senecio muninensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile remedy in traditional herbal medicine.
